About us

About Yukecms Enterprise website system

Shaoxing Eagles Textile Co., Ltd. was established in 2012, is a professional high-tech enterprise, producing stretch knitted fabric, widely used in lingerie, underwear, sportswear, swimwear, leggings and yoga.  Our main ...
